description: Read-only: answer a question about file contents.
prompt: How many non-empty lines does data.txt have? Just answer with the number — don't modify anything.
check: [ "$(cat data.txt | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = '6' ] && [ -z "$(find . -newer MARKER.txt -type f -not -path './.zap/*' -not -path './.agent_tmp/*' -not -name MARKER.txt 2>/dev/null)" ]
